text:
H(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #1)
I tried uploading the file twice. But there is a bug and an error comes up every time. I noticed the one was deleted in the first port bug request so I opened a new one (thought I accidentally deleted it and an error prevented me from adding more files).
I'm really sorry for the mess I caused.
In the full shar the file contains pkg-descr with description.
I'll add this to comment as well and fix the portlint commands
